_note: LuxStay is deployed via its own repo (JackH1010101010/luxstay). skip_deploy=true keeps deploy-all.js from duplicating it.
META_DESCRIPTION: 5-star hotels at member-only rates. Save 10–30% on London, Dubai and Bangkok luxury hotels. No minimum stay. Live pricing.
SCHEMA_DESCRIPTION: Member-only luxury hotel rates. 5-star hotels at below-retail prices, gated behind a free membership.
HERO_H1: Luxury hotel rates you won't find on Booking.com
HERO_SUB: Member-only pricing on 5-star hotels in London, Dubai and Bangkok. No minimum stay. Rates updated live.
MODAL_SUB: Unlock member-only hotel rates 10–30% below Booking.com. Takes 10 seconds.
MODAL_SUCCESS_TEXT: Member rates are now unlocked. Refresh prices to see your savings vs Booking.com.

seo_regions.name: Heathrow Airport
seo_regions.keyword: luxury hotels near Heathrow member rates
seo_regions.angle: Travelling through Heathrow Terminal 5? LuxStay members skip the rack rate and book the same London luxury hotels at 10–30% below Booking.com — before or after their flight.

seo_regions.name: Manchester & North of England
seo_regions.keyword: Manchester residents London luxury hotels member rates
seo_regions.angle: Manchester, Leeds and Birmingham residents travelling to London consistently find better rates through LuxStay's member channel — the same 5-star hotels at prices the public booking platforms simply don't show.

seo_regions.name: UK Travellers to Dubai
seo_regions.keyword: UK travellers Dubai luxury hotels member rates
seo_regions.angle: UK travellers heading to Dubai find LuxStay member rates cut 10–30% off the cost of 5-star hotels in Downtown Dubai and the Marina — without changing their itinerary at all.

seo_regions.name: GCC Visitors to London
seo_regions.keyword: Abu Dhabi Riyadh visitors London luxury hotels member rates
seo_regions.angle: Visitors from the UAE, Saudi Arabia and the wider Gulf region know London's luxury hotel market well. LuxStay member rates give GCC travellers access to the same five-star London properties at materially lower prices than any public platform.

editorial.title: About LuxStay member pricing
paragraphs: Hotels release a portion of their unsold inventory at net rates — below their public retail price — through Closed User Group (CUG) channels. These rates are legally restricted: they cannot be shown on public pages. They are only available to verified members of gated platforms.

LuxStay operates as a CUG platform. When you join, you gain access to net rates on 5-star hotels that are 10–30% below what Booking.com, Expedia, and Hotels.com show publicly. The same hotel, same room, same dates — just a better price because you're accessing it through a member channel.
Last-minute availability is highest from Wednesday onwards as hotels release unsold rooms for the upcoming weekend. This is when the deepest discounts appear.

faq_items.q: How much do members actually save?
faq_items.a: Members save between 10% and 30% compared to Booking.com public prices on the same hotels and dates. On a £300/night room that's £30–£90 back in your pocket. Savings vary by hotel, date, and availability — the best deals appear last-minute (Wednesday–Thursday for the weekend).

faq_items.q: Why can't I see the member price without joining?
faq_items.a: Hotel rate parity rules require that below-retail prices are only shown to verified members of closed platforms. Displaying them publicly would breach the hotel's distribution agreement. Joining LuxStay (free, takes 30 seconds) makes you a verified member and unlocks the below-retail rates.

faq_items.q: Is membership free? Are there any hidden fees?
faq_items.a: Yes, membership is completely free. There are no subscription fees, no booking fees added on top of the rate, and no minimum spend. You pay the member rate for the room — that's it.
London, Dubai and Bangkok are live now, with all three showing strong member savings. More cities are being added — if there's a destination you'd like to see, let us know when you join.
No. All hotels on LuxStay accept single-night bookings, including Friday-only or Saturday-only check-ins. This is specifically designed for last-minute weekend travellers who want flexibility.
